case_title: SIMPSON, ROBERT vs. SACKETT, JOHN et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMPSON, ROBERT SERVED JUL-02-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SACKETT, JOHN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIMPSON, ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SACKETT, JOHN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3907 22NDST, LEASE FORFEITED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $31.50 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMPSON, ROBERT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SACKETT, JOHN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT SACKETT, JOHN
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMPSON, ROBERT SERVED JUL-02-1993, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMPSON, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT SACKETT, JOHN
PHOTOCOPY FOR 24 COPY FOR CASE NUMBER 092454. NEITHER PARTY. FOR PLAINTIFF SIMPSON, ROBERT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMPSON, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT SACKETT, JOHN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
ORDER THAT SUMMONS BE SERVED TO DEFT BY POSTING ON THE PREMISES IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT A COPY OF THE SUMMONS, COMPLAINT BE MAILED BY CERTIFIED MAIL
